name: Old-Fashion Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, water, salt, and cream of tartar in a heavy-bottomed saucepan.
2. Cover the pan and bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Boil for 5 minutes without stirring.
4. Uncover the pan and wipe the sides with a damp cloth.
5. Continue boiling until the mixture reaches a firm ball stage (245°F - 248°F) as measured by an instant-read thermometer.
6. Remove from heat immediately.
7. Carefully pour the hot syrup over stiffly beaten egg whites, stirring constantly to incorporate air.
8. Beat until the mixture holds its shape when dropped in small spoonfuls.
9. Stir in vanilla extract and chopped nuts.
10. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper or a greased baking sheet.
11. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
